hero.title: Where Thought Finds its Voice
hero.subtitle: Step into a curated world of deep dialogues. We bridge perspectives and ignite growth through the art of collective thinking.

experience.title: The Art of Dialogue
experience.subtitle: Think Then Talk isn't just an event series. It's a laboratory for collective intelligence and empathy.

perk1.title: Deep Exploration
perk1.desc: Moving beyond surface-level small talk into the core of complex topics.

perk2.title: Curated Community
perk2.desc: Connecting with individuals who value listening as much as speaking.

perk3.title: Intellectual Growth
perk3.desc: Developing tools for critical thinking and articulate expression.

simulation.quote: In every session, I find that my perspective doesn't just expand—it transforms. It's a rare space where silence is as meaningful as the words spoken.
simulation.caption: The Community Experience

involved.subtitle: Shape the future of dialogue with us through these unique paths.

involved.sponsorshipDesc: Align your brand with thoughtful growth and intellectual depth.

moments.subtitle: Glimpses into the energy and focus of our past gatherings.

events.title: Upcoming Journeys
events.subtitle: Each event is a designed experience. Choose your next step into depth.

t1.name: Sarah J.
t1.text: The most meaningful weekend I've had in years. It changed how I approach my work and relationships.

t2.name: David M.
t2.text: Finally, a place where depth is the standard, not the exception. The curation is exceptional.

t3.name: Elena R.
t3.text: Think Then Talk provides the intellectual friction necessary to sharpen one's own ideas.

terms.title: Terms of Collaboration
terms.content:
At Think Then Talk, we strive to create a space for thoughtful dialogue. Joining us means:

  • Commitment to community values and diverse perspectives.
  • Ability to work in a team and be responsible.
  • A passion for continuous learning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Think Then Talk and our events.

whatIs.a: Think Then Talk is a community focused on fostering thoughtful conversations, critical thinking, and educational events. We believe in the power of dialogue and continuous learning.

howToJoin.q: How can I join the community?
howToJoin.a: The best way to join is by participating in our events! Simply browse our events page, find a topic that interests you, and sign up. You can also follow us on social media to stay updated.

isRegistrationRequired.q: Is registration required for all events?
isRegistrationRequired.a: Yes, most of our events require prior registration. This helps us manage capacity and provide the necessary resources and materials to all participants.

howToPay.q: How can I pay for paid events?
howToPay.a: We use a secure local payment gateway (Zarinpal) that supports all bank cards. You will be redirected to the payment page after completing the registration form.

onlineOrOffline.q: Are the events online or in-person?
onlineOrOffline.a: We host both online (via platforms like Google Meet or Zoom) and in-person events (mostly in Tehran). Each event page clearly specifies the format and location.

refundPolicy.q: Can I cancel my registration and get a refund?
refundPolicy.a: Refund policies vary by event. Generally, cancellations made at least 48 hours before the event are eligible for a partial or full refund. Please refer to our Terms of Service for full details.
